memos: (plugin/agents)
antipattern - Alexandria and other agents create agent-memory dirs in .ref-repos and other dirs they explore, polluting read-only sources
(plugin)
antipattern - README must be updated in the same commit as plugin changes, never deferred
(plugin/db)
antipattern - Alexandria reescribe contenido existente, no lo genera desde cero. Si hay que crear, lo hace el orquestador
(plugin/architecture)
requirement - referencias siempre de repos verificados contra produccion, nunca contenido inventado por Claude que puede alucinar
(plugin/ops)
requirement - scripts mandatorios con paths completos en SKILL.md, un agente cold-start debe poder ejecutar sin ambiguedad
(plugin/flow)
preference - parar después de cada paso, mostrar resultado, hablar antes de continuar
(plugin/marketplace)
requirement - add database plugin to marketplace roadmap
(plugin/seo)
requirement - SKILL.md frontmatter canonical third-person format, complete trigger phrases, nothing missing
(plugin/crew)
requirement - when syncing agents, only rename enterprise-audit to unmassk-audit, preserve all other skills they declare
(plugin/install)
requirement - install script must auto-gitignore generated .claude/*.json (except scopes)
